mapper.sql: id, article_id, user_id, root_comment_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, edited_at, edit_count, pinned, pinned_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
c.id, c.article_id, c.user_id, c.root_comment_id, c.parent_id, c.content, c.status, c.like_count, c.edited_at, c.edit_count, c.pinned, c.pinned_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at, c.version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date}
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY pinned DESC, pinned_at DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
ORDER BY pinned DESC, pinned_at DESC, ( like_count + ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment r WHERE r.root_comment_id = blog_comment.id AND r.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status = 'PUBLISHED' ) ) DESC, like_count DESC, created_at DESC, id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND parent_id IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_comment WHERE root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId} AND parent_id IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED'
SELECT FROM blog_comment WHERE root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY parent_id IS NULL DESC, created_at ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_comment SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), status = 'DELETED', pinned = 0, pinned_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE (id = #{rootCommentId} OR root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 100) + 1 FROM blog_comment WHERE id < 10000000000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (id, article_id, user_id, root_comment_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, pinned, pinned_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{rootCommentId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{pinned}, #{pinnedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_comment SET root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, like_count = #{likeCount}, edited_at = #{editedAt}, edit_count = #{editCount}, pinned = #{pinned}, pinned_at = #{pinnedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE blog_comment SET pinned = 0, pinned_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND parent_id IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND pinned = 1
UPDATE blog_comment SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), status = 'DELETED', pinned = 0, pinned_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_comment (id, article_id, user_id, root_comment_id, parent_id, content, status, like_count, pinned, pinned_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{articleId}, #{userId}, #{rootCommentId}, #{parentId}, #{content}, #{status}, #{likeCount}, #{pinned}, #{pinnedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE article_id = #{articleId}, user_id = #{userId}, root_comment_id = #{rootCommentId}, parent_id = #{parentId}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, like_count = #{likeCount}, pinned = #{pinned}, pinned_at = #{pinnedAt}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_comment SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE blog_comment SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{commentId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
